en: Then he said to Moses, "Come up to the LORD, you and Aaron, Nadab, and Abihu, and seventy of the elders of Israel, and worship from afar.
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要上到耶和華這裡來。你自己、亞倫、拿答、亞比戶和以色列長老中的七十人都要上來，你們要遠遠下拜。

en: Moses alone shall come near to the LORD, but the others shall not come near, and the people shall not come up with him."
zh: 只有摩西一人可以走近耶和華，他們卻不可以親近；人民也不可和摩西一同上來。”

en: Moses came and told the people all the words of the LORD and all the rules. And all the people answered with one voice and said, "All the words that the LORD has spoken we will do."
zh: 摩西下來，把耶和華的一切話和一切典章都向人民講述；人民都同聲回答，說：“耶和華吩咐的一切話，我們都必遵行。”

en: And Moses wrote down all the words of the LORD. He rose early in the morning and built an altar at the foot of the mountain, and twelve pillars, according to the twelve tribes of Israel.
zh: 摩西把耶和華的一切話都記下了；清早起來，在山下築了一座祭壇，按著以色列十二支派立了十二根柱子。

en: And he sent young men of the people of Israel, who offered burnt offerings and sacrificed peace offerings of oxen to the LORD.
zh: 又派了以色列人中的青年人去獻燔祭，又向耶和華殺牛獻為平安祭。

en: And Moses took half of the blood and put it in basins, and half of the blood he threw against the altar.
zh: 摩西取了一半的血，盛在盆中；又取了另一半的血，灑在祭壇上。

en: Then he took the Book of the Covenant and read it in the hearing of the people. And they said, "All that the LORD has spoken we will do, and we will be obedient."
zh: 他又把約書拿過來，念給人民聽；他們說：“耶和華吩咐的一切話，我們都必遵行和聽從。”

en: And Moses took the blood and threw it on the people and said, "Behold the blood of the covenant that the LORD has made with you in accordance with all these words."
zh: 摩西就取了血來，灑在人民的身上，說：“看哪，這是立約的血，這約是耶和華按著這一切話與你們立的。”

en: Then Moses and Aaron, Nadab, and Abihu, and seventy of the elders of Israel went up,
zh: 隨後，摩西、亞倫、拿答、亞比戶和以色列長老中的七十人都上了山。

en: and they saw the God of Israel. There was under his feet as it were a pavement of sapphire stone, like the very heaven for clearness.
zh: 他們看見了以色列的 神；在 神的腳下有好像藍寶石一樣晶瑩的鋪路，好像天色一般明亮。

en: And he did not lay his hand on the chief men of the people of Israel; they beheld God, and ate and drank.
zh: 他不伸手攻擊以色列人中的顯貴；他們看見 神，並且又吃又喝。

en: The LORD said to Moses, "Come up to me on the mountain and wait there, that I may give you the tablets of stone, with the law and the commandment, which I have written for their instruction."
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要上山到我這裡來，要住在這裡；我要把石版，就是我所寫的律法和誡命賜給你，使你可以教導人民。”

en: So Moses rose with his assistant Joshua, and Moses went up into the mountain of God.
zh: 於是，摩西和他的侍從約書亞起來；摩西就上到 神的山那裡去了。

en: And he said to the elders, "Wait here for us until we return to you. And behold, Aaron and Hur are with you. Whoever has a dispute, let him go to them."
zh: 但摩西對長老說：“你們要在這裡等候我們，直到我們再回到你們那裡來。看哪！這裡有亞倫和戶珥與你們在一起，誰有訴訟的案件，都可以到他們那裡去。”

en: Then Moses went up on the mountain, and the cloud covered the mountain.
zh: 摩西上到山上，有雲彩把山遮蓋著。

en: The glory of the LORD dwelt on Mount Sinai, and the cloud covered it six days. And on the seventh day he called to Moses out of the midst of the cloud.
zh: 耶和華的榮耀停在西奈山上，雲彩把山遮蓋了六天；第七天，耶和華從雲彩中呼喚摩西。

en: Now the appearance of the glory of the LORD was like a devouring fire on the top of the mountain in the sight of the people of Israel.
zh: 耶和華榮耀的景象，在以色列人眼前，好像在山頂上出現烈火。

en: Moses entered the cloud and went up on the mountain. And Moses was on the mountain forty days and forty nights.
zh: 摩西進入雲彩中，上到山上去；摩西在山上四十晝夜。
